text: What are the primary business functions and user workflows this AI system must perform?
aiAgentGuidance: Review use case description and propose core functions based on industry patterns.

text: What specific inputs will the system accept (text, images, audio, structured data)?
aiAgentGuidance: Analyze the proposed solution to infer expected input modalities.

text: What outputs must the system produce (decisions, recommendations, generated content, actions)?
aiAgentGuidance: Map desired outcomes to concrete output types based on use case goals.

text: What are the key user workflows/journeys this system must support?
aiAgentGuidance: Generate user workflow diagrams based on stakeholder descriptions.

text: What decision boundaries should the AI system operate within?
aiAgentGuidance: Requires human judgment on acceptable autonomy levels.

text: What are the fallback behaviors when the AI cannot provide a confident answer, including for ambiguous or conflicting inputs?
aiAgentGuidance: Propose standard fallback patterns (escalation, default response, graceful degradation).

text: How should the system handle ambiguous or conflicting inputs?
aiAgentGuidance: Suggest disambiguation strategies based on domain context.

text: What languages and locales must be supported?
aiAgentGuidance: Auto-detect from organization geography and target market.

text: What accessibility requirements apply (WCAG, screen readers, alternative inputs)?
aiAgentGuidance: Pull standard accessibility requirements based on industry and region.

text: What are the latency requirements for AI responses (real-time, near-real-time, batch)?
aiAgentGuidance: Recommend based on use case interaction type and industry benchmarks.

text: What is the expected throughput (requests per second/minute/hour)?
aiAgentGuidance: Estimate from user base size and expected usage patterns.

text: What are the availability requirements (99.9%, 99.99% SLA)?
aiAgentGuidance: Recommend SLA based on criticality classification.

text: What are the scalability requirements (horizontal/vertical, auto-scaling triggers)?
aiAgentGuidance: Propose scaling strategy based on traffic patterns and cloud platform.

text: What disaster recovery and business continuity requirements apply?
aiAgentGuidance: Map to standard DR classifications (RPO/RTO) based on criticality.

text: What monitoring and observability requirements are needed?
aiAgentGuidance: Generate monitoring checklist based on system architecture type.

text: What logging and audit trail requirements exist?
aiAgentGuidance: Apply regulatory logging requirements based on industry and data types.

text: What data retention and archival policies apply?
aiAgentGuidance: Look up regulatory retention requirements for the relevant jurisdiction.

text: What security classification does this system require?
aiAgentGuidance: Classify based on data sensitivity and regulatory framework.

text: What compliance certifications are required (SOC2, ISO 27001, HIPAA)?
aiAgentGuidance: Auto-determine from industry, region, and data types processed.

text: What type of generative AI capability is needed (text generation, summarization, Q&A, code generation, image generation)?
aiAgentGuidance: Map from use case description to specific GenAI capabilities.

text: What is the expected context window size needed (short-form, long-form, multi-document)?
aiAgentGuidance: Estimate context needs from input document sizes and conversation patterns.

text: What prompt engineering patterns are required (zero-shot, few-shot, chain-of-thought, ReAct)?
aiAgentGuidance: Recommend prompting strategies based on task complexity and accuracy needs.

text: What fine-tuning or customization requirements exist?
aiAgentGuidance: Assess need for fine-tuning vs. RAG vs. prompt engineering based on domain specificity.

text: What content safety and moderation requirements apply to generated outputs?
aiAgentGuidance: Apply content safety standards based on use case audience and regulatory context.

text: What hallucination detection and mitigation strategies are required?
aiAgentGuidance: Recommend detection methods (RAG grounding, citation verification, confidence scoring).

text: What grounding and citation requirements exist for generated content?
aiAgentGuidance: Define grounding strategy based on accuracy requirements and source availability.

text: What multimodal capabilities are needed (text+image, text+audio, etc.)?
aiAgentGuidance: Identify multimodal needs from input/output requirements.

text: What streaming vs. batch response patterns are required?
aiAgentGuidance: Determine based on user-facing vs. backend processing use case.

text: What token usage limits and cost controls should be implemented?
aiAgentGuidance: Propose rate limits and budget caps based on expected usage and pricing.

text: What output format requirements exist (JSON, Markdown, plain text, structured data)?
aiAgentGuidance: Infer from downstream system integration needs.

text: What level of autonomy should the AI agent have (advisory, semi-autonomous, fully autonomous)?
aiAgentGuidance: Requires human judgment — present autonomy levels with risk implications.

text: What tools and APIs should the agent be able to invoke?
aiAgentGuidance: Inventory available APIs and classify by risk level for agent access.

text: What human-in-the-loop checkpoints are required?
aiAgentGuidance: Requires human decision on where to insert approval gates.

text: What guardrails and safety boundaries must constrain agent behavior?
aiAgentGuidance: Generate guardrail recommendations based on autonomy level and domain.

text: What memory and context persistence requirements exist for the agent?
aiAgentGuidance: Recommend memory architecture based on conversation patterns and session duration.

text: What orchestration pattern is needed (single agent, multi-agent, hierarchical)?
aiAgentGuidance: Propose architecture based on task complexity and parallelism needs.

text: What error recovery and retry strategies should the agent employ?
aiAgentGuidance: Apply standard retry patterns (exponential backoff, circuit breaker, fallback).

text: What execution time limits should apply to agent tasks?
aiAgentGuidance: Recommend timeouts based on task type and user expectations.

text: How should the agent handle conflicting goals or instructions?
aiAgentGuidance: Requires human-defined priority rules and conflict resolution policies.

text: What audit trail requirements exist for agent actions and decisions?
aiAgentGuidance: Generate audit logging specifications based on regulatory requirements.

text: What existing systems must this AI system integrate with?
aiAgentGuidance: Discover integration points from IT landscape documentation.

text: What APIs (REST, GraphQL, gRPC) are required for integration?
aiAgentGuidance: Recommend API standards based on existing tech stack and performance needs.

text: What authentication and authorization mechanisms are needed for integrations?
aiAgentGuidance: Apply organization's standard auth patterns (OAuth, API keys, mTLS).

text: What data exchange formats and protocols are required?
aiAgentGuidance: Determine from downstream system specifications.

text: What event-driven integration patterns are needed (webhooks, message queues, streaming)?
aiAgentGuidance: Recommend event patterns based on real-time vs. batch requirements.

text: What is the target user persona and their technical proficiency level?
aiAgentGuidance: Create user personas from stakeholder descriptions and department profiles.

text: What user interface modalities are required (web, mobile, API, chat, voice)?
aiAgentGuidance: Recommend interfaces based on user personas and usage contexts.

text: What onboarding and training requirements exist for end users?
aiAgentGuidance: Draft onboarding plan based on system complexity and user proficiency.

text: How should AI confidence/uncertainty be communicated to users?
aiAgentGuidance: Propose UX patterns for confidence display (scores, indicators, explanations).

text: What feedback mechanisms should users have to correct or rate AI outputs?
aiAgentGuidance: Recommend feedback patterns (thumbs up/down, corrections, detailed ratings).

text: What is the expected user adoption curve and change management needs?
aiAgentGuidance: Model adoption curve based on similar AI deployments in the industry.

text: What acceptance criteria and user acceptance testing (UAT) process define successful system performance?
aiAgentGuidance: Draft acceptance criteria from success metrics and business objectives.

text: What testing types are required (unit, integration, UAT, adversarial, red team)?
aiAgentGuidance: Generate testing matrix based on system complexity and risk level.

text: What golden dataset requirements exist for validation?
aiAgentGuidance: Define dataset specifications based on input/output types and edge cases.

text: What performance benchmarks must the system meet before production?
aiAgentGuidance: Set benchmarks from industry standards and non-functional requirements.

text: What bias and fairness testing requirements apply?
aiAgentGuidance: Apply fairness testing framework based on protected attributes and use case domain.

text: What security and adversarial testing is required (prompt injection, jailbreaking, data exfiltration)?
aiAgentGuidance: Generate security test plan based on OWASP Top 10 for LLMs.

text: What regression testing strategy is needed for model updates?
aiAgentGuidance: Design regression test suite based on critical functionality and edge cases.

text: What A/B testing or canary deployment requirements exist?
aiAgentGuidance: Recommend deployment strategy based on risk tolerance and user base size.

text: What user acceptance testing (UAT) process and criteria are required?
aiAgentGuidance: Draft UAT plan with test scenarios from functional requirements.

text: What continuous evaluation and monitoring requirements apply post-deployment?
aiAgentGuidance: Generate monitoring dashboard requirements from KPIs and SLAs.
